hooks.prompt: Was a plan just executed with code changes (file edits/writes)? Only answer yes if implementation work was done — not for questions, discussions, commits, or config changes only. Respond {"decision": "block", "reason": "Plan execution completed. Run /commit to commit changes."} if yes, otherwise {"decision": "allow"}.

hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\bgit\b.*\bpush\b' || exit 0; DIR=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oP '(?<=-C )\S+' | head -1); [ -z "$DIR" ] && DIR=/workspaces/karasu; cd "$DIR" && npm run format:check 2>&1 && exit 0; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Format check failed. Run: npm run format"}}'
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then cd /workspaces/karasu && npx oxfmt --write "$FILE" 2>&1 && npx oxlint "$FILE" 2>&1; fi
